title: Integration tests instructions don't appear to work
body:
It could be user error, but I can't run a test using the below instructions:
https://github.com/containers/libpod/tree/master/test#running-a-single-integration-test

```
# GOPATH=~/go go test -v test/e2e/libpod_suite_test.go test/e2e/common_test.go test/e2e/config.go test/e2e/config_amd64.go test/e2e/build_test.go
go: finding github.com/xeipuuv/gojsonreference latest
=== RUN   TestLibpod
Running Suite: Libpod Suite
===========================
Random Seed: 1573068186
Will run 1 of 1 specs

Caching docker.io/library/alpine:latest at /tmp/alpine-latest.tar...Running: /root/tsweeney/workspaces/containers/podman/src/github.com/containers/libpod/bin/podman --root /tmp/crio --runroot /tmp/crio-run --runtime /usr/bin/runc --conmon /usr/libexec/podman/conmon --cni-config-dir /etc/cni/net.d --cgroup-manager systemd --tmpdir /tmp --events-backend file --storage-driver vfs pull docker.io/library/alpine:latest
Error: could not get runtime: please update to v2.0.1 or later: outdated conmon version
Failure [0.057 seconds]
[BeforeSuite] BeforeSuite 
/root/tsweeney/workspaces/containers/podman/src/github.com/containers/libpod/test/e2e/common_test.go:98

  Expected
      <int>: 125
  to equal
      <int>: 0

  /root/tsweeney/workspaces/containers/podman/src/github.com/containers/libpod/test/e2e/common_test.go:302
------------------------------
integration timing results

Ran 1 of 0 Specs in 0.060 seconds
FAIL! -- 0 Passed | 1 Failed | 0 Pending | 0 Skipped
--- FAIL: TestLibpod (0.06s)
FAIL
FAIL	command-line-arguments	0.099s
```

Yet the equivalent command from the command line succeeds:
```
[root@localhost libpod]# podman build test/e2e/build
STEP 1: FROM alpine
Getting image source signatures
Copying blob 89d9c30c1d48 done
Copying config 965ea09ff2 done
Writing manifest to image destination
Storing signatures
STEP 2: COMMIT
965ea09ff2ebd2b9eeec88cd822ce156f6674c7e99be082c7efac3c62f3ff652
```

I tried repointing conmon in test/e2e/common_test.go, but that proved not helpful too.

comments.body:
I faced the same error today while trying to run:
```
make vendor-in-container
podman run --privileged --rm --env HOME=/root -v `pwd`:/src -w /src docker.io/library/golang:1.13 make vendor
Error: could not get runtime: please update to v2.0.1 or later: outdated conmon version
make: *** [Makefile:530: vendor-in-container] Error 125
```
Mainly I cannot test podman on RHEL-8 due to this.
Are you able to download and compile a newer conmon from github.com/containers/conmon ?

Considering that I was able to build conmon on the same machine, including building the rpm and installing it, I suspect that conman building worked. I think that this error is specific to this make target. For the moment is not a blocker as I have other changes to merge but I will be back at it once it address those. I am not excluding local configuration problems.
@ssbarnea @TomSweeneyRedHat some news on this? i run into the same problem.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
I don't think a root cause has been found.  Tagging as a do-not-close until someone can eyeball it.
i *strongly* suspect you had an extra conmon somewhere and the integration tests were finding it by default.  closing. this works all day for the rest of us.
